en: But if you didn't grow up in church,.
ko: 아니면 성경 이야기를 하나도 모를 수도 있고.

en: You might not know a lot of Bible stories,.
ko: 너를 곤란하게 하진 않을게, 걱정하지 마.

en: Might not know any Bible stories.
I won't put you on the spot, don't worry.
ko: 한 번 누군가에게 물어봤더니 그 사람이 당황해서

en: I used to, learned my lesson.
One time I asked someone and they panicked and went,
VeggieTales!
Which, hey, close enough,.
But it did make me laugh real hard, just.
Who betrayed Jesus?
Bob the Tomato!
I remember, he bounced in like,.
You're gonna die, Jesus!
I'm kidding, they didn't do, no,.
ko: 농담이야, 그들은 그렇게 하지 않았어, 아니,

en: They didn't do the crucifixion on VeggieTales.
ko: 그들은 채소 이야기에서 십자가에 못 박히지 않았어.

en: They wouldn't do that.
That's crazy, that's way too dark.
Also, no arms, so who's gonna, you know.
ko: 그리고 팔도 없으니까, 누가 할 건데, 알지?

en: Who's gonna do the finale?
What are they gonna do, put baby carrots on Larry?
ko: 그들이 뭘 할 건데, 아기 당근을 래리 위에 올릴 건가?

en: That's insane, we can't do that.
